hooks.command: /mnt/c/Windows/System32/WindowsPowerShell/v1.0/powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$(wslpath -w ~/.claude/windows-notify.ps1)" -Title "応答完了" -Message "処理が完了しました" -IncludeWorkingDirectory

/mnt/c/Windows/System32/WindowsPowerShell/v1.0/powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$(wslpath -w ~/.claude/windows-notify.ps1)" -Title "入力待ち" -Message "Claudeが許可または入力を待っています" -Sound IM -IncludeWorkingDirectory
